description: Byte-for-byte vendored snapshot of the shared kyivtech design system. Committed into this repo so the Docker image is a self-contained, reproducible release that does NOT read from a sibling host repo at build time.
update_procedure: 2. shasum -a 256 public/design-system.css  -> update sha256 + bytes here
3. bump app patch version (package.json, package-lock.json, public/version.js) + CHANGELOG
4. npm run ci ; rebuild + redeploy via scripts/deploy.sh
NOTE: the Docker build never reads the portal path; it bakes public/design-system.css from this checkout.
